body_txt: What's the only type of woman more dangerous than a Mama Bear ? A woman who's been dumped, cheated on, or otherwise done wrong by her significant other (or, in some cases, merely thinks she's been). Especially if she's been hiding some sanity problems , and/or if she was a Clingy Jealous Girl . Otherwise Self-Explanatory . A villainess — particularly a queen — may react in this manner when she has very little claim on the other person . After all, It's All About Me . If the woman in question is part of an evil organisation, this may be her cue to pull a High-Heel–Face Turn . Almost Always Female , but male examples do exist. Compare Green-Eyed Monster and Thriving Ex-Crush . Not to be confused with the Psycho Ex-Girlfriend , although the chances of overlap are high. When a character is killed by said Woman Scorned, it's... well... Death by Woman Scorned , which crosses over with If I Can't Have You… and A Deadly Affair .
